title: helichrysum bujerianum
intro: Helichrysum bujerianum, also known as yellow mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum bujerianum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and essential oils, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression.
